title: 英伟达黄仁勋称"AI失业担忧"是"无稽之谈"
full_text:
Jun 1st, 2026
Nvidia's Huang Calls AI Jobs Concerns 'Nonsense'
Nvidia's Jensen Huang calls concerns of AI taking jobs “complete nonsense," saying instead that companies are hiring more software engineers due to the abilities of new agentic AI features.

discovery_record.discovery_title: 英伟达黄仁勋称"AI失业担忧"是"无稽之谈"
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋表示，关于AI会导致失业的担忧是"完全无稽之谈"。他指出，新的AI智能体功能实际上促使公司雇用了更多的软件工程师。
